roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Modify Victim Restitution
CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Remove SCRAM Device
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
DEF Motion to Add to Calendar  FOR PROGRESS REPORT / GPS REMOVAL

/CAL:CLARIFIATION OF SENTENCE & CONDITION OF PROBATION/X:THAMER MAZBAR, APD, APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE  IS AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED FOR A PERIOR OF 3 YEARS PROBATION FROM THE DATE OF SENTENCE/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE  RESIDENTIAL ALCOHOLTREATMENT PROGRAM THRU APD/ /SCRAMTERM/X:COURT ORDERS FOR APD'S OFFICE TOINSTALL & MONITOR SCRAM DEVICE/ /X:COUNTY JAIL OF 1 YEAR IS STAYED UPON COMPLETION OF IN-PATIENT ALCOHOL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:IF IN THE JUDGMENT OF TREATMENT PROVIDED, DEFENDANT CAN ENTER AN OUT-PATIENT TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTORD: THE COUNTY JAIL TERM IS TO BE SERVED THROUGH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT UNTIL SUCH TIME AS MR, GALAVIZ'S TREATMENT PROVIDERS DETERMINE THAT HE MAY TRANSITION TO OTHER TREATMENT(WITH COUNTY JAIL HAMMER IMPOSED IF DEFENDANTSELF-TERMINATES OR IS EXPELLED, OR FAILS TO ABIDE BY TREATMENT CONDITIONS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/RESTV/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVISE BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT ISNOT TO DRIVE DURING THE DURATION OF PROBATION/WEAP/WS/MOP1/CTORD: MULTIPLE OFFENDER'S DRUNK DRIVING PROGRAM IS TO BE FOR A 30 MONTH DURATION/IID:18 MONTHS/OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD PROGRESS REPORT/PROG: 07-20-21/CONTD: RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU: IN TREATMENT PROGRAM/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: #1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-11-21/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENDANT RETAINED COUNSEL, COURT RELIEVES THEPUBLIC DEFENDER,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL INDICATES HE RECEIVED AUTHORIZATION TOENTER A GENERAL TIME WAIVER ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT,/STWPX/X:COURT GRANTS DEFENSE COUNSEL'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 9/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:03-11-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH ASCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN2 A,A, SESSIONS PER WEEK, MUST NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL AND MUST NOT DRIVE A MOTOR VEHICLE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/TE:3 HOURS FOR HEARING/CONTD:DEPARTMENT 20 TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X:ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONTD: CLARIF OF SENTENCE & CONDITIONS OF PROBATION/DOPC/
